title: Red Hat Security Advisory: qt6-qtquick3d security update
overview:
An update for qt6-qtquick3d is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux CodeReady Linux Builder (v. 10)
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: qt6-qtquick3d security update

An update for qt6-qtquick3d is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for qt6-qtquick3d is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

CVE-2025-11277: A flaw was found in the assimp library. Processing a specially crafted input file can trigger a heap-based buffer overflow due to an integer overflow when reading texture data, causing a crash to the application linked to the library and resulting in a denial of service.
